seoTitle: Freshdesk Tutorial for Beginners: Customer Service Guide
metaDescription: A beginner's walkthrough of using Freshdesk for customer service, including how Freshdesk Freddy AI can support your team.
intro: If you're new to Freshdesk, getting oriented with the core ticketing workflow and its AI assistant, Freddy, will help you hit the ground running. This guide covers the essentials for beginners.

steps.heading: Get familiar with the ticket dashboard
steps.body: Start by exploring where tickets appear, how they're organized by status, and how to open one.

steps.heading: Learn the basics of replying to tickets
steps.body: Practice replying to a ticket, adding notes, and updating its status as you work through it.

steps.heading: Explore Freddy AI features
steps.body: Check out how Freddy AI can assist with drafting replies, summarizing tickets, or suggesting knowledge base content.

steps.heading: Set up your team and workflows
steps.body: Add agents, configure basic automation, and set up your knowledge base as your team grows into the platform.

faq.question: Is Freshdesk beginner friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Freshdesk is designed with an approachable interface that new users can learn relatively quickly.

faq.question: What is Freddy AI in Freshdesk?
faq.answer: Freddy AI is Freshdesk's built-in AI assistant that helps with tasks like drafting replies and generating content.

faq.question: Do I need training to use Freshdesk?
faq.answer: Formal training isn't required, though tutorials and Freshdesk's own documentation can speed up onboarding.

faq.question: Can I try Freshdesk before committing?
faq.answer: Freshdesk has historically offered trial periods or free plans, so check their current offerings before signing up.
